nodes.name: 生成飞书审批表单信息

parameters.query:
UPDATE mes2024.dbo.consm_barcodebindinfo
SET order_code = '{{ $json.json.order_number }}', modifytime='{{$json.create_time}}',Channel='{{$('Webhook').all()[0].json.body.channelId}}'
OUTPUT inserted.*
WHERE retroid='{{$json.retroid}}';

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM YFConsumer.dbo.consm_barcodebindinfo WHERE retroid IN ({{ $json.snList }});
